title: Iranian Officials Say Indirect Talks With U.S. Ended After Trump’s Latest Threat
summary_full: As the United States’ 8 p.m. deadline to open the Strait of Hormuz approaches, Iran vowed to retaliate if its power plants were attacked.
summary_public: As the United States’ 8 p.m. deadline to open the Strait of Hormuz approaches, Iran vowed to retaliate if its power plants were attacked.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran vowed to retaliate if its power plants were attacked.
